title: Cuneiform Tablet #0409: Ur III Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
